sql_array: CREATE TABLE dates_test (id INT, start_date DATE, end_date DATE);
INSERT INTO dates_test (id, start_date, end_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2022-01-01', DATE '2022-12-31');
UPDATE dates_test SET end_date = GREATEST(end_date, DATE '2023-01-01') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, GREATEST(start_date, end_date) AS later_date FROM dates_test;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dates_test WHERE GREATEST(start_date, end_date) > DATE '2022-06-30';
